# Pull Request Template

## Description
- Provide a concise summary of your changes and the motivation behind them.

## Checklist
- [ ] Follows the [Git Protocol](../../docs/standards/git_protocol.md)
- [ ] Adheres to [Code Style Standards](../../docs/standards/code_style.md)
- [ ] Passes all CI pipeline stages
- [ ] All new/changed code is tested (unit, integration, adversarial)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] Documentation updated as needed

## Testing Verification
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`make test`)
- [ ] Adversarial and edge cases tested
- [ ] Judges (Prosecutor, Defense, Tech Lead) maintain persona integrity

## Reviewer Notes
- List any areas needing extra scrutiny or context for reviewers.
- Link to related issues, ADRs, or documentation if applicable.

---

_Thank you for contributing to Automaton Auditor!_
